tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Eren Yeager is the main protagonist of Attack on Titan who dreams of destroying all Titans.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Eren possesses the power of the Attack Titan and later gains additional Titan abilities.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Eren's determination to achieve freedom drives the entire story.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Mikasa Ackerman is one of the strongest soldiers in the Scout Regiment and Eren's closest companion.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Mikasa has exceptional combat skills and uses ODM gear with extreme precision.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: She belongs to the powerful Ackerman bloodline.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Armin Arlert is a brilliant strategist and one of Eren's closest friends.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Armin inherits the Colossal Titan power later in the story.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Armin often saves his friends through intelligent strategies.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Levi Ackerman is the captain of the Scout Regiment and the strongest soldier in humanity.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Levi possesses incredible speed and combat skill using ODM gear.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Levi belongs to the Ackerman clan known for powerful warriors.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Reiner Braun is a warrior candidate who possesses the Armored Titan.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Reiner can transform into the powerful Armored Titan with immense durability.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Reiner struggles with his identity throughout the story.
